publishedAbstract: ODF upgrade process from ODF 4.14.z to 4.15.0-4 includes an automatic upgrade to update the DB data to work with PostgreSQL 15 instead of PostgreSQL 12. In case the upgrade fails, the Noobaa operator aborts the upgrade and revert to PostgreSQL 12. Completing the DB upgrade to Postgres 15 is necessary to ensure the stable operation of Noobaa and prevent upgrade issues in future versions. * Please note that this issue is not impacting customers that upgraded from ODF 4.14.z to ODF 4.15.5 or higher. *
publishedTitle: Recovery NooBaa's PostgreSQL upgrade failure in OpenShift Data Foundation 4.15+
